exceptions.ref: fleet/native-supervisor and broad slash or management surfaces
exceptions.reason: Excluded from this stability-fix cluster because TLH intentionally keeps narrower workflow/control surfaces and does not adopt the upstream native supervisor/fleet management stack in this intake.
Adapted or excluded wherever upstream changes would bypass TLH private runtime resolution, alter profile scoping/discovery expectations, or otherwise conflict with fork-only runtime behavior.

notes: Adopted selected async recovery, session scoping, model fallback, thinking sanitization/frontmatter, completion guard, and foreground detach/result-metadata fixes from the reviewed stability-fix cluster.
